events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / high risk**. The mistracking (off-center loading + idler skew) points to workers likely reaching near live nip points to correct tracking without LOTO, plus secondary fire/edge-damage and spillage/slip hazards. Immediate controls center on stop-and-lockout before any tracking adjustment, verifying nip-point guarding per OSHA 1910.212, and correcting loading alignment and idler skew per CEMA before restart.
